title: My Badger
description: A mod that adds badgers from "Minecraft Legends"
body:
![Badger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16d4244bcc902311e5c3fe28528fce7b80ee20db.png)## **Requires Geckolib**
## 
**"My Badger"** is a mod that adds **badgers** from **Minecraft Legends**. These small creatures can now spawn in your **Dark Forests**, where they feel at home.
These new mobs are voracious, consuming **eggs**, **sweet berries**, and **brown mushrooms**, as indicated by their **mob drops**.

The **badger** will receive **future updates** that enhance the experience with the mob, such as **custom sounds**, the ability to **attack chickens**, and **various other improvements**.

![Badger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d787676d15d505dab056818611e21a55ee57b561.png)

# **Loot Table**
